identity_name: T Corp. Class 3 Collection Staff Don Quixote

synergies.reason: 'N.O.' inflicts Tremor via the support passive — helps reach 10+ Tremor thresholds on key skills.
'It flows and cries' inflicts Tremor via the support passive — helps reach 10+ Tremor thresholds on key skills.

synergies.teammate_name: The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair

core_idea: T Corp. Class 3 Collection Staff Don Quixote is a Tank — **Tremor** control (Tremor — Chain). Scaling conditions: Clash Power +1 per 6 Tremor (max +2).
playstyle_guide:
- **Tremor — Chain** — enemy loses **Clash Power** at high Tremor Potency on target.
- **Time Moratorium** — time the stored-damage pop with your Tremor stacks.
- Front-load **+8 Aggro** on the slot you want enemies to target.
- **Counter: I Shall Summon the Time** grants 4 **Borrowed Time at Turn End** at Combat Start — use the defense slot to prep buffs before your main attacks.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: Clash Power +1 per 6 Tremor (max +2).

**S1 — Let Us Prepare to Collect** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Extremely Low).
- **Clash Power** scales with **Tremor** (+1 per 6, max +2) — build stacks first.
- draws enemy aggro — intended to absorb hits
- Gain +4 Aggro to this Skill Slot next turn

**S2 — T Corp. Accelerated Amputator** (BP 4, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- **Clash Power** scales with **Tremor** (+1 per 6, max +2) — build stacks first.
- Gain +3 Tremor Count; [On Use] Clash Power +1 for every 6 Tremor on target (max 2)

**S3 — I Command Thee, Halt!** (BP 4, CP +3, x4): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- **Clash Power** scales with **Tremor** (+1 per 6, max +2) — build stacks first.
- triggers Amplitude Conversion into Tremor — Scorch

Combat passive — **Golden Time - Extracting**: Turn End: If this unit's HP is between 10% ~ 20%, instantly heal 80% of this unit's max HP, and recover from Stagger. (once per Encounter).
  - When this unit loses Borrowed Time, gain +8 Aggro to one of this unit's Skill Slots next turn.

Combat passive — **T Corp. Physics Distortion Field**: When 1 ally with the slowest Speed takes damage from enemies that have Tremor, take -10% damage.

Defense skill — **Counter: I Shall Summon the Time**: [Combat Start] If this unit is not in a Borrowed Time state, gain 4 Borrowed Time at Turn End (once per turn).
  - [On Use] For this turn: when hit by an enemy, inflict 3 Tremor on target next turn (6 times per turn).
team_suggestions: - **District 20 Yurodivy Ryōshū**: 'N.O.' inflicts Tremor via the support passive — helps reach 10+ Tremor thresholds on key skills.
- **N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū**: 'It flows and cries' inflicts Tremor via the support passive — helps reach 10+ Tremor thresholds on key skills.
- **Zwei Assoc. West Section 3 Ishmael**: Mechanic similarity score: 0.94. *(similarity-based — verify)*
